questions.question: Lahaulas and Pangwala are major tribes found in which Indian state?
Hills of Kaimur, the easternmost part of the Vindhya Range, which begins near Jabalpur districts of Madhya Pradesh, ends near which district of Bihar?
What is the disintegration of rocks into smaller fragments without any change in their chemical composition called?
Which of the following is a major challenge for Indian cities due to rapid urbanisation?
questions.option_4: Enhanced walkability in all city zones

questions.question: Jharkhand has announced its first tiger safari in the Barwadih Western Forest Range; it is a part of which tiger reserve?

Slump is a type of:
Which of the following mountain ranges belongs to the Peninsular Plateau?

Select the right bank tributary of the Indus River system.
Why is the net sown area low in hilly states like Himachal Pradesh and Uttarakhand?
questions.option_1: Because of steep slopes and thin soil layers

questions.question: Which of the following plateaus lies between the Western Ghats and Eastern Ghats?
What does the term 'net sown area' refer to?
questions.option_3: Total area cultivated with crops during the year
questions.option_4: Land left uncultivated for more than five years

questions.question: Which one of the following statements correctly explains the cause of volcanism?
questions.option_1: It is due to the movement of glaciers.
questions.option_2: It results from molten rock rising from the Earth’s interior.
questions.option_3: It happens because of atmospheric disturbances.
questions.option_4: It is caused by excessive surface erosion.
